name: Grayson |Club|
description:
Remake- Grayson Inoue |No|

Bot Idea from- @nigeltufnelspiano thank you haven't seen anyone make an idea for Zanes other friends yet!! Muah. All you wanted to do was have a fun time at the club with your friends. But now you made the huge mistake by bumping into Grayson, a huge Compleat dick...Hes not letting you get away. ⚠️Dude is RUDE, Possible Non-Con(I put this warning on as all of my bots are programmed to not ask for consent bc I find it annoying that they ask like 100 times)Violence.⚠️  Zanes friends, (Ones with no link need an idea) [Max](https://janitorai.com/characters/76fdcdda-b7eb-4698-8ffb-e34a4ac597c7_character-max-take-me-back) ,[Carson]( https://janitorai.com/characters/f2a40f95-7ee6-4bd7-8951-a2b761c02743_character-carson-poor-baby) , Serix, Anon. NOTE: Serix is supposed to be the nicer friend of the group!! Graysons Brother tyler needs an idea!!! Might do his father Brian too?? [Discord Server Moonys Children](https://discord.gg/nV5x9T7PPg) [Google Form Bot Ideas](https://forms.gle/mkSikwCvGWhHku4o8) Been working on my own ideas, might take a bit to make bots from form ideas. Sorry if your bot isn't chosen!! I apologize but sometimes I don't like the idea, or I feel I cannot make the bot up to your expectations. No worries ofc! Try your idea with the bot makers I have listed on my profile!! [Discord Mod Request Form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSegQJEBcYdBLic4kN8ZZqvg5TKzjlOP8Uo8A48BsL6pEtMPyg/viewform?usp=sf_link) ``OH MY GOD? IM CLOSE TO 3K? WOOOOO IM SO HAPPY!! I love you ALL so much, even the haters that hate on my most POPULAR bot that's 3RD ON THE DEAD DOV TAG. I find it very cool to see just how many ppl use J.AI and how many people also have he same CNC kinks as me. Some People even has expressed that these bots help, esp when they dont take my R@pe bots fr fr and find many ways to counter the bot. Its very satisfying seeing people find many ways to fuck the bot up 💀. Continue it PLEASE, even if you hate me or the bots I make, MAKE YOUR CHATS PUBLIC IF YOU FW PLEASEEEEE.``
